scripts.build:jsx: npx babel src/app.jsx --out-file public/app.js --presets=@babel/preset-react --source-type script --source-maps --minified && printf '\nwindow.SQLQuest = SQLQuest;\n' >> public/app.js
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:jsx && npm run build:data && cp src/index.html public/index.html && cp src/app.html public/app.html && cp src/meta-sql-interview.html public/meta-sql-interview.html && cp src/meta-sql-interview.html public/meta-sql-interview/index.html && cp src/google-sql-interview.html public/google-sql-interview.html && cp src/google-sql-interview.html public/google-sql-interview/index.html && cp src/amazon-sql-interview.html public/amazon-sql-interview.html && cp src/amazon-sql-interview.html public/amazon-sql-interview/index.html && mkdir -p public/after-the-sql-course && cp src/after-the-sql-course.html public/after-the-sql-course.html && cp src/after-the-sql-course.html public/after-the-sql-course/index.html && node scripts/cachebust.js
scripts.build:check: npm run lint && npm test -- --run && npm run build
scripts.dev:watch: npx nodemon --watch src --ext jsx,js,css,html --exec 'npm run build'
